name: Sauteed Abalone
recipeIngredient: 3/4 Cup Sifted Seasoned Dry Bread Crumbs
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the abalone into 3/8-inch-thick steaks across the grain and pound to tenderize.
2. Mix the egg and milk and beat slightly. Place the mixture in a shallow plate.
3. In a separate plate, place the bread crumbs.
4. Dip the abalone in the egg wash and then coat in the bread crumbs.
5. When the oil is hot, sauté the abalone steaks for about 1 1/2 to 2 minutes on each side.
